mapper.select: SELECT NCPATD.POINT_TXN_SEQ ,NCPATD.REMAIN_POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_ACU_TXN_DTL NCPATD WHERE NCPT.POINT_TXN_SEQ = NCPATD.POINT_TXN_SEQ AND NCPATD.REMAIN_POINT > 0 AND NCPT.POINT_USE_POSBL_ST_DATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyymmddhh24miss') AND NCPT.POINT_USE_POSBL_END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyymmddhh24miss') AND NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ = #{pointCustSeq} ORDER BY NCPT.POINT_USE_POSBL_END_DATE ASC, POINT_TXN_SEQ ASC

SELECT POINT_CUST_SEQ , USER_ID , SVC_CNTR_NO , TOT_ACU_POINT , TOT_USE_POINT , TOT_REMAIN_POINT , TOT_EXTINCTION_POINT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(POINT_SUM_BASE_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS POINT_SUM_BASE_DATE FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo}
